title: Reflective DLL Loading Indicators
description: Detects indicators of reflective DLL loading where DLLs are loaded from memory without touching disk.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*ReflectiveLoader*' or 'Command Line' like '*Invoke-ReflectivePEInjection*' or 'Command Line' like '*sRDI*')))

tests.test_name: WinPwn - Reflectively load Mimik@tz into memory
